_schema_notes: v3 2026-04-22: added D.2 DEMO captures (Roofle + Roofr) per decisions/d2-gate-2-contamination-policy.md. Nulled contaminated NEXGEN contractor-install values on rows 1–3 (prior roofle_low/roofle_high were NEXGEN installs, not DEMO). Added roofle_demo_mid + roofr_demo_low/mid/high + per-competitor measurement_quality flags + gate_2_target (resolved per locked policy). Pipeline A frozen at 0367980.

gate_2_policy.threshold: ≥90% of valid denominator within ±15% of gate_2_target

removal_reasons.9: Bohannon: both competitors 🔴 (Roofle pool-cage over-capture, Roofr 3-neighbor aggregation). Flagged for re-capture with manual parcel-select on Roofr.

addresses._roofle_low_high_note: Nulled 2026-04-22 — prior values $19,671-$21,639 were NEXGEN contractor-install, not DEMO. HARD RULE violation. See feedback_roofle_roofr_demo_only.md.
addresses.gate_2_target_reason: Roofr 🟡 (A+B = 2 structures on property, 7,803 sqft). Roofle 🟢 single-structure. Use Roofle.

Both 🟢. Roofle polygon single-structure clean (detached pool+cage excluded, Golf Manor pattern). Roofr single polygon 6,599 sqft + no A+B summing. 33% price disagreement reflects typical Roofle-vs-Roofr base-rate spread (see D.2 pattern). OR-gate; D.5 passes if RuufPro within ±15% of EITHER.
addresses.notes: Replaces #2 Ernest (GHOST) per Track D.5-fixture-surgical-swap 2026-04-23. Duval RE# 148611-0000 MUNSCH KENNETH MICHAEL. Pool+cage detached from main roof (Golf Manor pattern — should NOT over-capture). Roofr survey: /survey-results/d7db9e03-ee9a-484a-8209-655792a48152.
